# LauncherMode enumeration

How the launcher menu lays itself out.

```csharp
public enum LauncherMode
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Minimal | `0` | Compact vertical column of pinned entries (+ Settings). |
| Full | `1` | Grouped tile grid showing every entry, with pin toggles. |
